purpose: C-05 dependency-free source intake and candidate draft contract

validation_rules.url_sources: arxiv, github, and article require an http(s) source_url.
validation_rules.manual_sources: manual sources may omit source_url only when user_note explains the origin.
validation_rules.title_or_note: A title or user_note is required to create a draft.
validation_rules.persistence: localStorage stores only local draft UI state; it is not production persistence or sync.
